title: Daily Highlights Email

posts.author: Kennyv (Ken Vazanko)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is regarding “Daily Highlights” that I receive via email.

Is there a way to set a time to receive them each day? I receive the emails later in the day with a message, “Good morning” and it could be 6pm local time.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Ken

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
This Is Is happening since long Time…
This requires a fix

posts.author: JimW (Jim Way)
posts.cookedHtml: Renewing this item. I have the same question. Would like to be able to schedule the daily highlights email so I get it first thing in the morning. Any help from the folks at Monday?

posts.author: XZR (XZR)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes we are new to this platform and some users would prefer their daily highlights email first thing in the morning rather than after 11AM EST. Please allow scheduling by time and day (exclude weekends).
